prompts: Japanese fantasy RPG arcane library, warm wood interior. Eri Ironleaf in cream and mint robes and Eri Dawncrest in layered blue robes stand facing each other. They raise their hands in a synchronized two-person spell practice, glowing soft mana ribbons weaving between their palms, calm cooperative body motion, high quality anime style, no text, no watermark.

Same continuous arcane library shot; Eri Ironleaf and Eri Dawncrest maintain the synchronized pose. Eri Dawncrest adjusts their hand position slightly, causing the soft mana ribbons to stabilize and glow brighter between them, calm teamwork, focused expressions, consistent lighting and character design, no text, no watermark.
